    • SectionComposite

      public SectionComposite(EditPage page, org.eclipse.ui.forms.widgets.FormToolkit toolkit, org.eclipse.ui.forms.widgets.ScrolledForm form, org.eclipse.swt.widgets.Composite compParent, IInternalElement parent, IElementRelationship rel, int level)

  • Method Details

    • createContents

      private void createContents()
      Create section's contents. XXX If the prefix label is empty, then the section's header (including folding and add controls) is not created.

    • notVoid

      private boolean notVoid(String prefix)

    • createFooter

      private void createFooter(String str)

    • createHeader

      private void createHeader(String str)
      Create the header of the section.

      This consists of:

      • A spacer composite for indentation according to the level
      • A twistie control which controls section folding.
      • Text for the section prefix label (e.g. 'EVENTS')
      • An 'add' button - to add new elements into this section
      Parameters:
      str - leading spaces

    • getPrefixFormText

      private static String getPrefixFormText(String sectionName, int spaceBefore)

    • isExpanded

      protected boolean isExpanded()

    • folding

      protected void folding()

    • setExpand

      public void setExpand(boolean isExpanded, boolean recursive)
      Description copied from interface: ISectionComposite
      Set the expand status of the section composite.
      Specified by:
      setExpand in interface ISectionComposite
      Parameters:
      isExpanded - true if the section composite is going to expand, false otherwise.
      recursive - true to propagate expand state recursively

    • setExpandNoReflow

      public void setExpandNoReflow(boolean isExpanded, boolean recursive)
      Description copied from interface: ISectionComposite
      Set the expand status of the section composite without reflowing the main form widget.
      Specified by:
      setExpandNoReflow in interface ISectionComposite
      Parameters:
      isExpanded - true if the section composite is going to expand, false otherwise
      recursive - true to propagate expand state recursively

    • updateExpandStatus

      void updateExpandStatus()

    • createElementComposites

      private void createElementComposites()

    • dispose

      public void dispose()
      Description copied from interface: ISectionComposite
      Dispose this section composite. This is done recursively, i.e. the Element Composite children is disposed first, then this Section Composite parent itself.
      Specified by:
      dispose in interface ISectionComposite

      public void refresh(IRodinElement element)
      Description copied from interface: ISectionComposite
      Refresh the information display in the composite.
      Specified by:
      refresh in interface ISectionComposite
      Parameters:
      element - a Rodin element

      public IElementType<?> getElementType()
      Description copied from interface: ISectionComposite
      Get the element type (the type of the children) of this section composite.
      Specified by:
      getElementType in interface ISectionComposite
      Returns:
      the element type for the children elements.

    • childrenChanged

      public void childrenChanged(IRodinElement element, IElementType<?> childrenType)
      Description copied from interface: ISectionComposite
      Refresh the edit composite recursively when there are some changes for children of input type of the input element.
      Specified by:

      Parameters:
      element - a Rodin element.
      childrenType - a Rodin element type.

    • indexOf

    • select

      public boolean select(IRodinElement element, boolean selected)
      Description copied from interface: ISectionComposite
      Select / Deselect an Rodin element.
      Specified by:
      select in interface ISectionComposite
      Parameters:
      element - a Rodin element
      selected - true if the element is selected. false if the element is de-selected.
      Returns:
      true if the operation is successful, i.e. if the element is indeed selected or de-selected accordingly to the input selectedvalue. Return false otherwise.

      recursiveExpand in interface ISectionComposite
      Parameters:

    • edit

      public void edit(IInternalElement element, IAttributeType attributeType, int charStart, int charEnd)
      Description copied from interface: ISectionComposite
      Edit the element for a certain attribute given the attributeType, the start and end positions.
      Specified by:
      edit in interface ISectionComposite
      Parameters:
      element - an internal element.
      attributeType - an attribute type IAttributeType.
      charStart - start position.
      charEnd - end position.

    • refresh

      public void refresh(IRodinElement element, Set<IAttributeType> set)
      Description copied from interface: ISectionComposite
      Refresh the information display in the composite if there are some changes for attribute of input type within the input element.
      Specified by:
      refresh in interface ISectionComposite
      Parameters:
      element - a Rodin element.
      set - a set of attribute types, must not be null. When this is an empty set, the operation is the same as ISectionComposite.refresh(IRodinElement)

      Description copied from interface: ISectionComposite
      Refreshes the prefix marker of this section.
      Specified by:
      refreshPrefixMarker in interface ISectionComposite
